title: Cheaper Shelves
description: Doubles the amount of shelves you get when crafting from 6 to 12!
body:
# Cheaper Shelves
Doubles the amount of shelves you get when crafting from 6 to 12!

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/631d2fd7324c851d12f4f9fb87f63cf7d96fb588.png)

The recipe is the same as in Vanilla Minecraft, it just returns more shelves.
